FORBIDDEN.title: Access Denied
FORBIDDEN.message: You do not have permission to perform this action.

NOT_FOUND.title: Not Found
NOT_FOUND.message: The requested resource or page does not exist.

CONFLICT.title: Data Conflict
CONFLICT.message: The data on the server has changed. Please refresh the page.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Validation Error
VALIDATION_ERROR.message: Please check your input — some fields contain errors.

TOO_MANY_REQUESTS.title: Too Many Requests
TOO_MANY_REQUESTS.message: You are sending too many requests. Please slow down.

INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR.title: Server Error
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR.message: An internal server error occurred. We are working on it.

NETWORK_ERROR.title: Connection Lost
NETWORK_ERROR.message: Please check your network connection and try again.

UNKNOWN_ERROR.title: Something Went Wrong
UNKNOWN_ERROR.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN.title: Session Expired
INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN.message: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

PRODUCT_OUT_OF_STOCK.title: Out of Stock
PRODUCT_OUT_OF_STOCK.message: There is insufficient stock available for this product.

CART_EMPTY.title: Cart is Empty
CART_EMPTY.message: Add items to your cart before checking out.

REVIEW_ALREADY_EXISTS.title: Review Already Exists
REVIEW_ALREADY_EXISTS.message: You have already left a review for this product.

ORDER_CANNOT_BE_CANCELLED.title: Cancellation Impossible
ORDER_CANNOT_BE_CANCELLED.message: The order cannot be cancelled at this stage.
